name: Atlas Memory
description: Auditable cognitive memory with immutable revision lineage, dependencies, Ripple reassessment, safe recall, and opt-in capture.

scope.label: Memory scope
scope.help: Agent isolates by profile and agent. Session also isolates each conversation.

autoRecall.label: Auto-recall
autoRecall.help: Inject up to three relevant memories as explicitly untrusted historical context.

autoCapture.label: Auto-capture
autoCapture.help: Opt-in capture of bounded user preferences, facts, and explicit decisions.

pythonCommand.label: Python executable
pythonCommand.help: Optional Python 3 executable path. Defaults to python3 on Unix and python on Windows.
